strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React work in recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE)
Hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure — a rare match for the JD's AI requirement
Strong testing culture: TDD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skills list; Java experience appears dated (robotics work 2016-2018)
Testing tooling named in the JD (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) is not explicitly listed, though adjacent experience is evident
response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years requirement with recent, directly relevant TypeScript/Node/React/MongoDB product work, cloud and Kubernetes exposure, and demonstrated AI-agent tooling experience that few applicants will have. Craftsmanship signals (TDD, CI/CD, open-source test frameworks, teaching) suggest strong code-review and quality contributions. Gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js) and secondary languages (Kotlin/Python), which are learnable given the polyglot track record spanning D, C++, Java, and Swift.
